name: South Carolina Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except soy and butter in a saucepan.
2. Simmer for 10 minutes over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in the soy sauce and butter until well combined.
Use as a basting sauce for BBQ meats or as a condiment when serving grilled pork, beef, or chicken.
